name: FIRSTSUN CAPITAL BANCORP
summary: Part I In this report, unless the context suggests otherwise, references to the Company or FirstSun refers to FirstSun Capital Bancorp, a Delaware corporation, and references to we, us, and our refer to the combined business of FirstSun Capital Bancorp and its wholly-owned subsidiaries, including Sunflower Bank, National Association (Sunflower Bank or the Bank), Sunflower Wealth Advisors LLC, and FEIF Capital Partners, LLC.
